# Jonathan M. Torres (Business)

<!-- vimeo: 1111802032 | track: English (auto-generated) -->

Hello everyone. I'm Jonathan Torres and I'm an associate professor and business and data services librarian at Rutgers University of Newark. Over the past couple years, I've been working collaboratively with business students to demonstrate the use of Chad GPT and other generative AI platforms, enabling them to conduct effective research tailored to their business needs. Throughout this process, I've developed a framework that enabled us to think critically while using generative AI platforms, library databases, and critically understand what type of information is being produced by these resources. Utilizing the chart in which I created called the research validation chart. In fact, this pedagogical approach was so successful to the point where I was able to publish this in a peer review publication titled Leveraging Chat, GPT and Bard for Academic Librarians and Information Professionals, A Case Study Developing Pedagogical Strategies using Generative AI Models.
